# Bimatoprost 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Bimatoprost 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Bimatoprost</strong> 目前有 <strong>33 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Bimatoprost 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Reduction of elevated intraocular pressure in chronic open-angle glaucoma and ocular hypertension (as monotherapy or as adjunctive therapy to beta-blockers).</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L2</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（100.0%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（100.0%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（100.0%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（100.0%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（100.0%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（100.0%）</li>
<li>diffuse alopecia areata（100.0%）</li>
<li>alopecia（100.0%）</li>
<li>genetic alopecia（100.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arteriovenous malformation (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension（100.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with congenital heart disease（100.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with connective tissue disease（99.9%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with schistosomiasis（99.9%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with chronic hemolytic anemia（99.9%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with HIV infection（99.9%）</li>
<li>polycystic kidney disease 3 with or without polycystic liver disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>pseudopelade of Brocq（99.8%）</li>
<li>thoracic malformation（99.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/bimatoprost/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
